name: crimes-monorepo
description: A crime scene investigator for your codebase. Built for agents, readable by humans.
author: Andrew Mayfield

scripts.ci: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.scan:example: pnpm --filter crimes build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js scan examples/messy-ts-app
scripts.scan:example:json: pnpm --filter crimes build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js scan examples/messy-ts-app --format json
